definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Entity" id="spawnedflate">spawnedflate</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="spawn_entity"><field name="entity">CUSTOM:TripFlare</field><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><next><block type="entity_push" inline="false"><value name="entity"><block type="variables_get_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:spawnedflate</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="math_dual_ops"><field name="OP">MULTIPLY</field><value name="A"><block type="entity_look_angle_x"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value></block></value><value name="y"><block type="math_dual_ops"><field name="OP">MULTIPLY</field><value name="A"><block type="entity_look_angle_y"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value></block></value><value name="z"><block type="math_dual_ops"><field name="OP">MULTIPLY</field><value name="A"><block type="entity_look_angle_z"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></block></value></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
